response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with relevant geospatial exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, but the core technical requirement of modern C++ or Rust development is essentially absent. The only C/C++ work listed is a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, over a decade ago, and there is no Rust experience or navigation guidance/routing pipeline background. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which do not substitute for the C++ systems work this role centers on.
strengths: Genuine geospatial domain experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Senior-level engineering tenure with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong testing and craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
concerns: No modern C++ experience; only dated, brief C/C++ work from 2014-2015
No navigation/routing systems or production map-data pipeline background
